architecture.routing: server/routes.ts (API endpoints, user auth, position management)

services.price_service: server/services/price-service.ts (Core fetching logic for BIST, US, TEFAS)
services.price_monitor: server/services/price-monitor.ts (Background CRON jobs and interval-based updates)
services.cache_layer: server/services/fund-price-cache.ts (In-memory cache for TEFAS fund prices)
services.ai_analysis: server/prompt.ts (System prompts and logic for Gemini-based portfolio analysis)

bist_logic.fallback: Last known price from Database or null

us_stock_logic.fallback: Last known price from Database or null

tefas_fund_logic.fallback_3: Returns null if no fallback available
tefas_fund_logic.quota_protection: Disabled manual live fetches and on-demand updates for funds

current_issues: ScraperAPI credits are a bottleneck for fund updates.
TEFAS API remains fragile behind Cloudflare.
potential_improvements: Implement a more robust caching strategy for exchange rates.
Consider migrating TEFAS endpoints to the same Google Sheets architecture if ScraperAPI limits become a severe problem.
